after_hours_flow_summary: Greet caller. Ask purpose. If emergency (e.g. gas station pump down, urgent electrical), collect name, number, address and transfer to Ben immediately. If non-emergency, collect details and assure follow-up next business day.
office_hours_flow_summary: Greet caller. Ask purpose. Qualify job type (does Ben do this work?). Collect name, number, address, preferred date/time. Inform caller team will follow up to confirm appointment. Route urgent calls or VIP numbers directly to Ben.
